meals.name: Tofu Scramble
ingredients: tofu, spinach, bell peppers, onions, turmeric, black salt, olive oil
meals.reason: High in protein and fiber, good for muscle recovery and satiety
swaps: swap tofu with tempeh for a different texture and flavor

meals.name: Quinoa Salad
ingredients: quinoa, mixed greens, cherry tomatoes, cucumber, chickpeas, lemon-tahini dressing
meals.reason: Complete protein source, rich in vitamins and minerals, supports muscle growth and recovery
swaps: swap quinoa with farro for a different texture and flavor

meals.name: Lentil Soup

meals.reason: High in protein and fiber, good for muscle recovery and satiety, provides essential vitamins and minerals

ingredients: chickpeas, spinach, bell peppers, onions, garlic, ginger, coconut milk, turmeric, cumin

ingredients: mixed vegetables, tofu, brown rice, soy sauce, sesame oil

ingredients: banana, peanut butter, almond milk, chia seeds, oats
